title: perf: replace DELETE with UNLINK in EmbeddingsCache for better memory management

new_comments.body:
Hi, I'm **Jit**, a friendly security platform designed to help developers build secure applications from day zero with an [MVS](https://www.jit.io/) (Minimal viable security) mindset.

In case there are security findings, they will be communicated to you as a comment inside the PR.

Questions? Comments? Want to learn more? [Get in touch with us](https://www.jit.io/contact).

reply_reason: jit-ci[bot] 是安全扫描机器人，仅发送通用欢迎消息，无具体安全发现，无需回复

title: feat: add reference_image_path support to image_generate tool

new_comments.body: Duplicate of #18805. Multiple PRs already implement reference image support for image_generate: #18805, #21854, #21570, #15308, #21463. The canonical issue is #21562.

reply_reason: alt-glitch 指出该 PR 与 #18805 等 PR 重复，需要回复说明本 PR 的独特性，或确认是否可以关闭。建议回复：1）如果实现方式不同，解释差异；2）如果确实重复，礼貌关闭并感谢 reviewer
